title: Castlelake fund agrees to buy easyJet for 6.4 billion euros
summary: The low-cost airline accepts a takeover offer valuing it at 5.5 billion pounds, sending its shares up 10% in the stock market.

title: Global markets trade higher, DAX hits new record and Wall Street points to gains
summary: European stock markets and U.S. futures rise driven by German industrial orders data and expectations for the earnings season.

title: Retirement planning takes center stage in debate between pension reforms and retirement strategies
summary: Analysts and experts question traditional retirement strategies as governments evaluate reforms to pension and Social Security systems.

title: Big investors maintain their bet on private credit despite market volatility
summary: Private capital consolidates in established European firms, while financial institutions mobilize billions to fund companies.

title: Artificial intelligence transforms banking and unleashes global regulatory 'arms race'
summary: Governments around the world implement rules for AI in financial services, while banks integrate the technology to optimize their operations.

title: Gold rises driven by dollar drop to two-week lows and weak U.S. employment data
summary: The precious metal extends its rally on expectations of looser monetary policy, amid a weaker greenback and geopolitical tensions.

title: OPEC+ agrees to production increase of 188,000 barrels per day and oil prices fall
summary: Crude oil prices fall more than 1% as the market assesses the supply increase and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz to navigation.

title: Ibex 35 extends losses and loses 19,800-point level dragged down by energy stocks
summary: The Spanish index leads losses in Europe, hit by Acciona and Solaria, as investors prepare for the start of earnings season.

title: ITV agrees to sell its media and entertainment division to Comcast's Sky for up to 1.6 billion pounds
summary: The deal values the operation at $2.1 billion and transforms the British television landscape by combining ITV's assets with the Sky platform.

title: Analysts debate whether Disney should separate its parks business after Comcast's NBCUniversal spinoff
summary: Comcast's strategic move sparks speculation on whether a similar asset separation could benefit Disney's stock price.

title: Analysts assess whether Sandisk stock is still a buy after surging 4,885%
summary: The memory chip maker has accumulated a spectacular rise since its spinoff, and experts debate the stock's future growth potential.

title: Can buying Eli Lilly stock today set you up financially for life according to analysts?
summary: The U.S. pharmaceutical company is highlighted for its strong portfolio of innovative drugs and consistent long-term growth track record in the market.

title: New artificial intelligence stock enters Dow Jones index after accumulating 300% gain
summary: Wall Street's most emblematic index adds a heavyweight from the tech sector, whose historical performance suggests a continued bullish pattern according to analysts.

title: SpaceX's inclusion in Nasdaq-100 takes a back seat to a bigger catalyst for stocks on July 7
summary: Investors focus on a key corporate event that could have a transformative impact on Elon Musk's company valuation.

title: SK Hynix plans to raise $28 billion with secondary listing in the United States
summary: The South Korean memory chip maker seeks a dual listing to expand its investor base and fund its growth in the artificial intelligence sector.

title: Cybersecurity stocks like Cloudflare and CrowdStrike draw attention from high-growth investors
summary: Several analyses point to leading cybersecurity companies, including Palo Alto Networks and Datadog, as the best investment options following CrowdStrike's stock split.

title: Fed chair's statements and Iran crisis shake expectations on monetary policy
summary: Comments by Kevin Warsh on Fed balance sheet reduction, along with tensions in the Middle East, generate uncertainty in bond and oil markets.

title: Hyundai confirms $27 billion investment in future technologies
summary: The South Korean automotive giant announces a spending plan to boost electric mobility, autonomous driving, and artificial intelligence.

title: Novartis acquires biotech Myricx Bio for $1.1 billion to strengthen oncology portfolio
summary: The Swiss pharmaceutical company adds next-generation antibody-drug conjugate technology for cancer treatment through this strategic acquisition.

title: Thales agrees to buy defense company Exail Technologies for 3.9 billion euros
summary: The French defense group strengthens its position in navigation and robotics with this acquisition, boosting Exail's shares.
